title: activity — scheduled tasks
description: Cron entries registered by `ActivityServiceProvider::schedule()`. UTC throughout. `runOnOneServer` on every entry so multi-node worker pools do not duplicate work. `withoutOverlapping` where windows may exceed the interval.

entries.description: Daily 03:00 UTC. Dispatches PurgeExpiredActivitiesJob for every tenant / log_name — respects per-tenant retention policies. 03:00 chosen to run before the daily digest emails (04:00) so digest recipients don't see rows that will be purged the same day.
Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC. For tenants with retention > 90d, moves rows in the 90d..retention_days window to cold storage (S3 Parquet). Sunday chosen to avoid weekday performance impact.

Daily 03:30 UTC. Closes orphan batches from crashed requests (ActivityBatchStarted with no matching ActivityBatchCompleted, age > 24h). Runs after the purge so orphan cleanup happens on the still-retained hot table.

Daily 08:00 UTC. Reads pending-digest sets accumulated during the last 24h and fires ActivityDigestEmailNotification per opted-in recipient. 08:00 UTC hits European working hours; per-user timezone shifts still center around morning.
Weekly Monday 08:00 UTC. Reads the 7-day pending-digest sets and fires the weekly variant of ActivityDigestEmailNotification. Recipients who opted for weekly-only receive one email per Monday.

Daily 00:05 UTC. Emits activity volume metric per tenant per day into the monitoring stream — powers capacity planning. Runs at :05 to ensure the previous day's writes are all durable before counting.
